description: Create an authors slide in a two-column layout with a list of six author profiles and a thank-you note at the bottom.

items.text: Kate Ferrara — Vice chair and US transportation, hospitality, and services sector leader, Deloitte Consulting LLP

main.title: Thank you
main.body: The authors would like to thank Sanjay Vadrevu for his contribution to this survey.
